message:
fix(tests): re-enable deadlock test and add timeout guards for peer sync (dolt-test-ebm)

- Re-enable TestConcurrentExternalRefImports: deadlock was fixed by
  subsequent SQLite connection pool changes (MaxOpenConns=1 for
  in-memory DBs). Verified stable with 5 runs + race detector.
- Add Go-level timeout wrappers to TestSyncWithCredentials (30s) and
  TestBidirectionalSync (60s) to prevent indefinite hangs from Dolt
  CALL statements that do not respect context cancellation.
- Remove t.Skip() from all three known test gaps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
